data.label: get-issuers
data.description: Synchronous webhook trigger that accepts a POST request containing a bearer token, tax year, and correlation ID supplied by the end user. The integration runs the full pipeline inline and returns the Avalara issuers response directly to the caller.
steps: Expects a JSON body with bearerToken, taxYear, and xCorrelationId
Runs in sync response mode — the HTTP response is held open until the pipeline completes

data.label: validate-input
data.description: Guards downstream steps by asserting all three required fields are present in the request body. Any missing field causes an immediate error that propagates back to the caller as a failed sync response.
steps: Reads bearerToken, taxYear, and xCorrelationId from the webhook request body
Throws a descriptive error if any field is absent or null
Logs the validated taxYear and xCorrelationId at info level
Returns the typed GetIssuersRequest object for the next step

data.label: call-avalara-get-issuers
data.description: Makes an authenticated GET request to the Avalara 1099 ListIssuers endpoint using the avalara_1099 connection. The caller-supplied bearer token overrides the connection-level auth, and results are filtered server-side to the requested tax year.
steps: Builds the URL /1099/issuers?$filter=taxYear eq {taxYear} using an OData filter
Sets Authorization header to the caller-supplied bearerToken (must include 'Bearer ' prefix)
Throws a descriptive error on any non-2xx response, including the status code and body
Returns the parsed PaginatedIssuersResponse (value[], count, nextLink) to the webhook caller
